name: elevatex-prospect
description: ElevateX Prospect - Ferramenta interna de prospecção comercial inteligente

scripts.build:api: cd apps/api && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.build:web: cd apps/web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npx prisma@6 generate --schema=apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma@6 db push --schema=apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss && cd apps/web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.setup: cd apps/api && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && cd ../../apps/web && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd apps/api && npx prisma db push
